dimensions.name: Comprehension
checks: reader can understand without external help

verdict_algorithm.conditional: one or two scores between 5 and 6 inclusive and no score below 5
verdict_algorithm.fail: any score < 5 or three or more scores between 5 and 6 inclusive

forbidden_inventions: dates not present in the source
owners not present in the source
budgets not present in the source
demographics not present in the source
adoption probabilities not present in the source
baselines or targets not present in the source
